pack.name: Pool Maintenance
pack.description: Core pool water, filter, and seasonal maintenance tasks.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

entity_requirements.name: Pool pump runtime
entity_requirements.description: Optional runtime or power source that indicates the pool pump is running.

tasks.name: Test pool water
tasks.description: Test sanitizer, pH, alkalinity, and stabilizer.
tasks.instructions: Use a reliable test kit or strips and adjust chemicals according to product directions.

tasks.name: Clean pool filter after runtime
tasks.description: Clean or backwash the pool filter after pump runtime.
tasks.instructions: Clean, rinse, or backwash the filter according to the filter type and manufacturer instructions.

tasks.name: Review pool seasonal opening/closing
tasks.description: Prepare the pool for opening or closing based on local climate.
tasks.instructions: Use this as a reminder to follow your pool opening or closing checklist.
